title: Rahul Gupta
content:

## Featured Blogs

Over the last year, I've written content on my blog and newsletter. I try to keep things simple. You'll find writing about technologies I'm interested in at the time, or how I'm learning and growing in my career, sharing knowledge along the way.

[#### Peer to Peer Networks  July 15, 2024](https://www.rahulguptadev.in/blog/peer-to-peer)[#### Embracing The Grind  June 21, 2024](https://www.rahulguptadev.in/blog/embracing-the-grind)[All Blogs](https://www.rahulguptadev.in/blog)
